final:
module d_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RESET,
    output reg Q
);

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RESET) begin
    if (RESET) begin
        Q <= 0;
    end else begin
        Q <= D;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~D; if (CLK) begin Q <= RESET; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Q <= ~D; if (CLK) begin Q <= RESET; end
